title: 【转载】俄内政部称全面战争以来已有220起征兵办袭击和184起铁路破坏
meta_description: 【转载】俄内政部称全面战争以来已有220起征兵办袭击和184起铁路破坏 - 新闻来源俄罗斯反对派媒体meduza  The Russian authorities have recorded 220 attacks, including arson, against military enlistment offices and ...
meta_keywords: 转载,内政部,全面战争,以来,220起,征兵,袭击,184起,铁路,破坏
contents:
新闻来源俄罗斯反对派媒体meduza

The Russian authorities have recorded 220 attacks, including arson, against military enlistment offices and other government facilities since the start of the full-scale invasion of Ukraine, as well as 184 attacks on railway infrastructure, Russian state media（转载注：这里指塔斯社） reported on Monday, citing an Interior Ministry official.

The official said that 85 percent of the cases involving non-railway facilities have been solved, with 220 people identified as having been involved, including 15 minors.

Meanwhile, 141 people, including 59 teenagers, have reportedly been identified as responsible for railway attacks. “The risk group includes children from low-income families who have no moral principles and who are willing to commit any act for additional income, regardless of the risk to the public,” said the official.


据塔斯社报道，俄内政部称全面战争以来共发生了220起针对征兵办和其他政府部门的袭击，以及184起铁路破坏。内政部称85%的非铁路案件得到解决，包含15名未成年人在内的220名涉案人员已被查明，同时称包含59名少年在内的141人为铁路袭击案件负责。内政部表示包含低收入家庭儿童在内的危险群体，他们缺乏公共危机意识和道德底线，有动机为了额外收入而不择手段。
